differential_diagnoses: Nephrotic syndrome secondary to IgA nephropathy
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
Chronic liver disease with portal hypertension
next_steps: Perform 24-hour urine collection for total protein quantification and creatinine clearance
Perform abdominal fat pad aspiration for Congo red staining to evaluate for amyloidosis
Perform a kidney biopsy to determine the etiology of proteinuria
Perform echocardiography with strain imaging to evaluate for amyloid cardiomyopathy
Quantify serum B-type natriuretic peptide (BNP) or NT-proBNP
Avoid empiric immunosuppression until histological diagnosis is established
